tactic_proof: SIMP_TAC bool_ss [FILTER]

goal: !l. ~(NULL l) = (?e. MEM e l)
tactic_proof: Cases_on ‘l’ THEN SIMP_TAC bool_ss [EXISTS_OR_THM, MEM, NOT_CONS_NIL, NULL]

goal: (EL (NUMERAL (BIT1 n)) l = EL (PRE (NUMERAL (BIT1 n))) (TL l)) /\ (EL (NUMERAL (BIT2 n)) l = EL (NUMERAL (BIT1 n)) (TL l))
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [arithmeticTheory.NUMERAL_DEF, arithmeticTheory.BIT1, arithmeticTheory.BIT2, arithmeticTheory.ADD_CLAUSES, prim_recTheory.PRE, EL]

goal: !ls. (SUM ls = 0) = !x. MEM x ls ==> (x = 0)
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN SRW_TAC[] [SUM, MEM] THEN METIS_TAC[]

goal: !P ls. NULL (FILTER P ls) = !x. MEM x ls ==> ~P x
tactic_proof: GEN_TAC THEN LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN SRW_TAC[] [NULL, FILTER, MEM] THEN METIS_TAC[]

goal: WF \L1 L2. ?h:'a. L2 = h::L1
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC[relationTheory.WF_DEF] THEN BETA_TAC THEN GEN_TAC THEN CONV_TAC CONTRAPOS_CONV THEN Ho_Rewrite.REWRITE_TAC [NOT_FORALL_THM, NOT_EXISTS_THM, NOT_IMP, DE_MORGAN_THM] THEN REWRITE_TAC [GSYM IMP_DISJ_THM] THEN STRIP_TAC THEN LIST_INDUCT_TAC THENL [ALL_TAC, GEN_TAC] THEN STRIP_TAC THEN RES_TAC THEN RULE_ASSUM_TAC(REWRITE_RULE[NOT_NIL_CONS, CONS_11]) THENL [FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC, PAT_X_ASSUM (Term‘x /\ y’) (SUBST_ALL_TAC o CONJUNCT2) THEN RES_TAC]

goal: !R l1 l2. LIST_REL R l1 l2 <=> (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) /\ !n. n < LENGTH l1 ==> R (EL n l1) (EL n l2)
tactic_proof: GEN_TAC THEN SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [EQ_IMP_THM, FORALL_AND_THM] THEN CONJ_TAC THENL [ Induct_on ‘LIST_REL’ THEN SRW_TAC [] [] THEN Cases_on ‘n’ THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [], Induct_on ‘l1’ THEN Cases_on ‘l2’ THEN SRW_TAC [] [LIST_REL_rules] THEN POP_ASSUM (fn th => Q.SPEC_THEN ‘0’ MP_TAC th THEN Q.SPEC_THEN ‘SUC m’ (MP_TAC o Q.GEN ‘m’) th) THEN SRW_TAC [] [LIST_REL_rules] ]

goal: (!x y. R1 x y ==> R2 x y) ==> LIST_REL R1 l1 l2 ==> LIST_REL R2 l1 l2
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] [LIST_REL_EL_EQN]

goal: LIST_REL R (h::t) xs <=> ?h' t'. (xs = h'::t') /\ R h h' /\ LIST_REL R t t'
tactic_proof: Cases_on ‘xs’ THEN SRW_TAC [] []

goal: LIST_REL R xs (h::t) <=> ?h' t'. (xs = h'::t') /\ R h' h /\ LIST_REL R t' t
tactic_proof: Cases_on ‘xs’ THEN SRW_TAC [] []

goal: LIST_REL (\a b. P a b /\ Q a b) l1 l2 <=> LIST_REL (\a b. P a b) l1 l2 /\ LIST_REL (\a b. Q a b) l1 l2
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] [LIST_REL_EL_EQN] THEN METIS_TAC []

goal: LIST_REL R (MAP f l1) l2 <=> LIST_REL (R o f) l1 l2
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] [LIST_REL_EL_EQN, EL_MAP, LENGTH_MAP]

goal: LIST_REL R l1 (MAP f l2) <=> LIST_REL (\a b. R a (f b)) l1 l2
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [CONJ_ss] [LIST_REL_EL_EQN, EL_MAP, LENGTH_MAP]

goal: !x y. LIST_REL R x y ==> (LENGTH x = LENGTH y)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘LIST_REL’ THEN SRW_TAC [] [LENGTH]

goal: !xs1 zs. LIST_REL P (xs1 ++ xs2) zs <=> ?ys1 ys2. (zs = ys1 ++ ys2) /\ LIST_REL P xs1 ys1 /\ LIST_REL P xs2 ys2
tactic_proof: Induct >> fs[APPEND] >> Cases_on ‘zs’ >> fs[] >> rpt strip_tac >> simp[LIST_REL_CONS1, PULL_EXISTS] >> metis_tac[]

goal: !xs1 zs. LIST_REL P zs (xs1 ++ xs2) <=> ?ys1 ys2. (zs = ys1 ++ ys2) /\ LIST_REL P ys1 xs1 /\ LIST_REL P ys2 xs2
tactic_proof: Induct >> fs[APPEND] >> Cases_on ‘zs’ >> fs[] >> rpt strip_tac >> simp[LIST_REL_CONS2, PULL_EXISTS] >> metis_tac[]

goal: !R. equivalence R ==> equivalence (LIST_REL R)
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] [equivalence_def, reflexive_def, symmetric_def, transitive_def, LIST_REL_EL_EQN] >- (EQ_TAC >> SRW_TAC [][]) >> Q.PAT_X_ASSUM `!x y z. R x y /\ R y z ==> R x z` MATCH_MP_TAC >> Q.EXISTS_TAC `EL n y` >> CONJ_TAC >> FIRST_X_ASSUM MATCH_MP_TAC >> ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !f xs ys. list_size f (xs ++ ys) = list_size f xs + list_size f ys
tactic_proof: GEN_TAC \\ Induct \\ FULL_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [APPEND, list_size_thm]
gen_tac >> strip_tac >> simp[pairTheory.FORALL_PROD] >> Induct >> simp[] >> gen_tac >> Cases >> simp[]
ntac 2 strip_tac \\ Induct \\ ASM_REWRITE_TAC[] \\ gen_tac \\ Cases \\ ASM_SIMP_TAC bool_ss []
REWRITE_TAC [ZIP_def]

goal: (UNZIP [] = ([]:'a list,[]:'b list)) /\ (UNZIP ((x:'a,y:'b)::t) = let (L1,L2) = UNZIP t in (x::L1, y::L2))
tactic_proof: RW_TAC bool_ss [UNZIP] THEN Cases_on ‘UNZIP t’ THEN RW_TAC bool_ss [LET_THM, pairTheory.UNCURRY_DEF, pairTheory.FST, pairTheory.SND]

goal: !L. UNZIP L = (MAP FST L, MAP SND L)
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [UNZIP, MAP, PAIR_EQ, pairTheory.FST, pairTheory.SND]

goal: !(l1:'a list) (l2:'b list). (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> (LENGTH(ZIP(l1,l2)) = LENGTH l1) /\ (LENGTH(ZIP(l1,l2)) = LENGTH l2)
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REPEAT (FILTER_GEN_TAC (“l2:'b list”)) THEN LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC[ZIP, LENGTH, NOT_SUC, SUC_NOT, INV_SUC_EQ] THEN DISCH_TAC THEN RES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !pl. (LENGTH (FST (UNZIP pl)) = LENGTH pl) /\ (LENGTH (SND (UNZIP pl)) = LENGTH pl)
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [UNZIP, LENGTH]

goal: !l:('a # 'b)list. ZIP(UNZIP l) = l
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[UNZIP, ZIP]

goal: !l1:'a list. !l2:'b list. (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> (UNZIP(ZIP(l1,l2)) = (l1,l2))
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REPEAT (FILTER_GEN_TAC (“l2:'b list”)) THEN LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[UNZIP, ZIP, LENGTH, NOT_SUC, SUC_NOT, INV_SUC_EQ] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN RES_THEN SUBST1_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !l1 l2 f1 f2. (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> (ZIP (MAP f1 l1, l2) = MAP (\p. (f1 (FST p), SND p)) (ZIP (l1, l2))) /\ (ZIP (l1, MAP f2 l2) = MAP (\p. (FST p, f2 (SND p))) (ZIP (l1, l2)))
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [MAP, LENGTH] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THENL [ Q.SUBGOAL_THEN ‘l2 = []’ SUBST_ALL_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [ZIP, MAP] THEN mesonLib.ASM_MESON_TAC [LENGTH_NIL], Q.SUBGOAL_THEN ‘?l2h l2t. (l2 = l2h::l2t) /\ (LENGTH l2t = LENGTH l1)’ STRIP_ASSUME_TAC THENL [ mesonLib.ASM_MESON_TAC [LENGTH_CONS], ASM_SIMP_TAC bool_ss [ZIP, MAP, FST, SND] ] ]

goal: !(l1:'a list) (l2:'b list) p. (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> (MEM p (ZIP(l1, l2)) = ?n. n < LENGTH l1 /\ (p = (EL n l1, EL n l2)))
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN SIMP_TAC bool_ss [LENGTH] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THENL [ ‘l2 = []’ by ASM_MESON_TAC [LENGTH_NIL] THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [ZIP, MEM, LENGTH], ‘?l2h l2t. (l2 = l2h::l2t) /\ (LENGTH l2t = LENGTH l1)’ by ASM_MESON_TAC [LENGTH_CONS] THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [MEM, ZIP, LENGTH] THEN EQ_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THENL [ Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘0’ THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [EL, HD], Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘SUC n’ THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [EL, TL], Cases_on ‘n’ THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [EL, HD, TL]

goal: !(l1:'a list) (l2:'b list) n. (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) /\ n < LENGTH l1 ==> (EL n (ZIP (l1, l2)) = (EL n l1, EL n l2))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SIMP_TAC arith_ss [LENGTH] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN ‘?l2h l2t. (l2 = l2h::l2t) /\ (LENGTH l2t = LENGTH l1)’ by ASM_MESON_TAC [LENGTH_CONS] THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [ZIP, LENGTH] THEN Cases_on ‘n’ THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [ZIP, EL, HD, TL]

goal: !l1 l2. (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> !f:'a->'b->'c. MAP2 f l1 l2 = MAP (UNCURRY f) (ZIP (l1,l2))
tactic_proof: let val UNCURRY_DEF = pairTheory.UNCURRY_DEF in LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REPEAT (FILTER_GEN_TAC (“l2:'b list”)) THEN LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC[MAP, MAP2, ZIP, LENGTH, NOT_SUC, SUC_NOT] THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[CONS_11, UNCURRY_DEF, INV_SUC_EQ] end

goal: (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> (MAP FST (ZIP (l1,l2)) = l1) /\ (MAP SND (ZIP (l1,l2)) = l2) /\ (MAP (f o FST) (ZIP (l1,l2)) = MAP f l1) /\ (MAP (g o SND) (ZIP (l1,l2)) = MAP g l2)
tactic_proof: Q.ID_SPEC_TAC ‘l2’ THEN Induct_on ‘l1’ THEN SRW_TAC [] [] THEN TRY(Cases_on ‘l2’) THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [ZIP, MAP]

goal: !(l:'a list) x. MEM x l = ?n. n < LENGTH l /\ (x = EL n l)
tactic_proof: Induct THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [MEM, LENGTH] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THENL [ Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘0’ THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [EL, HD], Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘SUC n’ THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [EL, TL], Cases_on ‘n’ THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC arith_ss [EL, HD, TL] THEN ASM_MESON_TAC [] ]

goal: !n l. n < LENGTH l ==> MEM (EL n l) l
tactic_proof: RW_TAC std_ss [MEM_EL] >> Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘n’ >> ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !ls1 ls2. (LENGTH ls1 = LENGTH ls2) /\ (!x y. f (x,y) = g x + h y) ==> (SUM (MAP f (ZIP (ls1,ls2))) = SUM (MAP g ls1) + SUM (MAP h ls2))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN Cases_on ‘ls2’ THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss] [MAP, ZIP, MAP_ZIP, SUM]

goal: !R l1 l2. LIST_REL R l1 l2 <=> LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2 /\ EVERY (UNCURRY R) (ZIP (l1,l2))
tactic_proof: GEN_TAC THEN Induct THEN SRW_TAC[] [LENGTH_NIL_SYM] THEN SRW_TAC [] [EQ_IMP_THM, LIST_REL_CONS1] THEN SRW_TAC [] [EVERY_DEF, ZIP] THEN Cases_on ‘l2’ THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC(srw_ss())[EVERY_DEF, ZIP]

goal: !P l. ~EVERY P l <=> ?i. i < LENGTH l /\ ~P (EL i l) /\ !j. j < i ==> P (EL j l)
tactic_proof: rpt STRIP_TAC >> reverse EQ_TAC >- (rw [NOT_EVERY, EXISTS_MEM] \\ Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘EL i l’ >> rw [MEM_EL] \\ Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘i’ >> rw []) >> rw [EVERY_EL, EXISTS_MEM, MEM_EL] >> Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘LEAST n. n < LENGTH l /\ ~P (EL n l)’ >> numLib.LEAST_ELIM_TAC >> CONJ_TAC >- (Q.EXISTS_TAC ‘n’ >> rw []) >> Q.X_GEN_TAC ‘i’ >> rw [] >> Q.PAT_X_ASSUM ‘!m. m < i ==> _’ (MP_TAC o (Q.SPEC ‘j’)) >> ‘j < LENGTH l’ by RW_TAC arith_ss [] >> RW_TAC bool_ss []

goal: !P l. EXISTS P l <=> ?i. i < LENGTH l /\ P (EL i l) /\ !j. j < i ==> ~P (EL j l)
tactic_proof: rw [EXISTS_NOT_EVERY] >> MP_TAC (Q.SPEC ‘\x. ~P x’ NOT_EVERY_EXISTS_FIRST) >> rw []

goal: !l1 l2:'a list. REVERSE (l1 ++ l2) = (REVERSE l2) ++ (REVERSE l1)
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [APPEND, REVERSE_DEF, APPEND_NIL, APPEND_ASSOC]

goal: !l P. FILTER P (REVERSE l) = REVERSE (FILTER P l)
tactic_proof: Induct THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC bool_ss [FILTER, REVERSE_DEF, FILTER_APPEND_DISTRIB, COND_RAND, COND_RATOR, APPEND_NIL]

goal: !ls. (ls <> []) ==> (LAST ls = EL (PRE (LENGTH ls)) ls)
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SRW_TAC[] [] THEN Cases_on ‘ls’ THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) []

goal: !xs. LENGTH (FRONT xs) = LENGTH xs - 1
tactic_proof: Cases >> simp[LENGTH_FRONT_CONS]

goal: !l:'a list. ~(l = []) ==> (APPEND (FRONT l) [LAST l] = l)
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [NOT_CONS_NIL] THEN POP_ASSUM MP_TAC THEN Q.SPEC_THEN ‘l’ STRUCT_CASES_TAC list_CASES THEN REWRITE_TAC [NOT_CONS_NIL] THEN STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [FRONT_CONS, LAST_CONS, APPEND]

goal: LAST (h::t) = if t = [] then h else LAST t
tactic_proof: Cases_on ‘t’ THEN SRW_TAC [] []

goal: !l n. LENGTH l <= n ==> (TAKE n l = l)
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss] []

goal: LENGTH (TAKE n xs) = if n <= LENGTH xs then n else LENGTH xs
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] [] THEN fs [GSYM NOT_LESS] THEN AP_TERM_TAC THEN MATCH_MP_TAC TAKE_LENGTH_TOO_LONG THEN numLib.DECIDE_TAC

goal: !n x l. x < n ==> (EL x (TAKE n l) = EL x l)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘n’ >> ASM_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [TAKE_def] >> Cases_on ‘x’ >> Cases_on ‘l’ >> ASM_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [TAKE_def]

goal: !f n l. MAP f (TAKE n l) = TAKE n (MAP f l)
tactic_proof: Induct_on‘l’ THEN SRW_TAC[][TAKE_def]

goal: !n. n <= LENGTH l1 ==> (TAKE n (APPEND l1 l2) = TAKE n l1)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l1’ THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss] [TAKE_def]

goal: !n. LENGTH l1 < n ==> (TAKE n (l1 ++ l2) = l1 ++ TAKE (n - LENGTH l1) l2)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l1’ THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss] [arithmeticTheory.ADD1]

goal: !n l1. n <= LENGTH l1 ==> !l2. DROP n (l1 ++ l2) = DROP n l1 ++ l2
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l1’ >> simp[] >> Cases_on ‘n’ >> simp[]

goal: !l1 n. LENGTH l1 <= n ==> !l2. DROP n (l1 ++ l2) = DROP (n - LENGTH l1) l2
tactic_proof: Induct >> simp[] >> Cases_on ‘n’ >> simp[GSYM arithmeticTheory.ADD1]

goal: !n l1 l2. DROP n (l1 ++ l2) = DROP n l1 ++ DROP (n - LENGTH l1) l2
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l1’ >> simp[] >> Cases_on ‘n’ >> simp[]
Induct_on ‘l’ >> srw_tac[][]

goal: !l m n. m <= LENGTH l /\ n <= LENGTH l ==> (TAKE m l = TAKE n l <=> m = n)
tactic_proof: rpt STRIP_TAC >> rw [LIST_EQ_REWRITE] >> EQ_TAC >> rw []

goal: !m n. TAKE n (TAKE m l) = TAKE (MIN n m) l
tactic_proof: Induct_on‘l’ >> rw[] >> Cases_on‘m’ >> Cases_on‘n’ >> SRW_TAC[numSimps.ARITH_ss][arithmeticTheory.MIN_DEF, arithmeticTheory.ADD1] >> FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss() ++ numSimps.ARITH_ss) []

goal: !l n. 0 < n /\ n <= LENGTH l ==> (FRONT (TAKE n l) = TAKE (n - 1) l)
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss][TAKE_def, DROP_def] >> `0 < n - 1 /\ n - 1 <= LENGTH l` by numLib.DECIDE_TAC THEN SRW_TAC [][FRONT_DEF] THENL [ fs [], `(n - 1) - 1 = n - 2` by numLib.DECIDE_TAC THEN SRW_TAC [][] ]

goal: !l n. LENGTH l <= n ==> (DROP n l = [])
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss] []

goal: !x ls n. MEM x (DROP n ls) <=> ?m. m + n < LENGTH ls /\ x = EL (m + n) ls
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘ls’ >> rw[DROP_def, LT_SUC] >> asm_simp_tac(srw_ss() ++ DNF_ss)[] >- simp[MEM_EL] >> Q.RENAME_TAC [‘n <> 0’] >> Cases_on ‘n’ >> fs[] >> asm_simp_tac (srw_ss() ++ numSimps.ARITH_ss ++ CONJ_ss) [GSYM arithmeticTheory.ADD1, ADD_CLAUSES]

goal: !n l. n < LENGTH l ==> (HD (DROP n l) = EL n l)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l’ >> asm_simp_tac (srw_ss() ++ DNF_ss) [LT_SUC]

goal: !m n l. m + n < LENGTH l ==> (EL m (DROP n l) = EL (m + n) l)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l’ >> SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [] >> Cases_on ‘n’ >> FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [DROP_def, ADD_CLAUSES]

goal: !l i. MAP f (DROP i l) = DROP i (MAP f l)
tactic_proof: Induct \\ simp[DROP_def] \\ rw[]

goal: !ls. MAP f (FRONT ls) = FRONT (MAP f ls)
tactic_proof: Induct >> simp[] >> Cases_on ‘ls’ >> fs[]

goal: !l1 l2. LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2 ==> !f a. FOLDL2 f a l1 l2 = FOLDL (\a. UNCURRY (f a)) a (ZIP (l1,l2))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN1 SRW_TAC[] [LENGTH_NIL_SYM, ZIP, FOLDL] THEN GEN_TAC THEN Cases THEN SRW_TAC [] [ZIP, FOLDL]

goal: !f1 f2 l1 l2. (MAP f1 l1 = MAP f2 l2) <=> (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) /\ LIST_REL (\x y. f1 x = f2 y) l1 l2
tactic_proof: NTAC 2 GEN_TAC THEN Induct THEN SRW_TAC [] [LENGTH_NIL_SYM, MAP] THEN Cases_on ‘l2’ THEN SRW_TAC [] [MAP] THEN PROVE_TAC[]

goal: !l1 l2 f. EVERY2 f l1 l2 <=> LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2 /\ EVERY (UNCURRY f) (ZIP (l1,l2))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN1 SRW_TAC [] [LENGTH_NIL_SYM, EQ_IMP_THM, ZIP] THEN GEN_TAC THEN Cases THEN SRW_TAC [] [ZIP, EQ_IMP_THM]

goal: !P l1 l2. EVERY2 P l1 l2 ==> (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2)
tactic_proof: PROVE_TAC[EVERY2_EVERY]

goal: !l. ALL_DISTINCT l = !x. MEM x l ==> (FILTER ((=) x) l = [x])
tactic_proof: LIST_INDUCT_TAC THEN ASM_SIMP_TAC (bool_ss ++ COND_elim_ss) [ALL_DISTINCT, MEM, FILTER, DISJ_IMP_THM, FORALL_AND_THM, CONS_11, EQ_IMP_THM, lemma] THEN metisLib.METIS_TAC []

goal: !P l. ALL_DISTINCT l ==> ALL_DISTINCT (FILTER P l)
tactic_proof: Induct_on ‘l’ THEN SRW_TAC [] [MEM_FILTER]

goal: !f ls. ALL_DISTINCT (MAP f ls) ==> ALL_DISTINCT ls
tactic_proof: GEN_TAC THEN Induct THEN SRW_TAC[][ALL_DISTINCT, MAP, MEM_MAP] THEN PROVE_TAC[]

goal: !l. ALL_DISTINCT l = (!n1 n2. n1 < LENGTH l /\ n2 < LENGTH l ==> ((EL n1 l = EL n2 l) = (n1 = n2)))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SRW_TAC [] [] THEN EQ_TAC THENL [ REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN Cases_on ‘n1’ THEN Cases_on ‘n2’ THEN SRW_TAC [numSimps.ARITH_ss] [] THEN PROVE_TAC [MEM_EL, LESS_MONO_EQ], REPEAT STRIP_TAC THENL [ FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [MEM_EL] THEN FIRST_X_ASSUM (Q.SPECL_THEN [‘0’, ‘SUC n’] MP_TAC) THEN SRW_TAC [] [], FIRST_X_ASSUM (Q.SPECL_THEN [‘SUC n1’, ‘SUC n2’] MP_TAC) THEN SRW_TAC [] [] ] ]

goal: !l n1 n2. ALL_DISTINCT l /\ n1 < LENGTH l /\ n2 < LENGTH l ==> ((EL n1 l = EL n2 l) = (n1 = n2))
tactic_proof: PROVE_TAC[EL_ALL_DISTINCT_EL_EQ]

goal: !l1 l2. ALL_DISTINCT (l1++l2) = (ALL_DISTINCT l1 /\ ALL_DISTINCT l2 /\ (!e. MEM e l1 ==> ~(MEM e l2)))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN SRW_TAC [] [] THEN PROVE_TAC []

goal: !x. ALL_DISTINCT [x]
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] []

goal: !l1 l2. ALL_DISTINCT l1 /\ (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> ALL_DISTINCT (ZIP (l1,l2))
tactic_proof: Induct THEN Cases_on `l2` THEN SRW_TAC [] [ZIP] THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [MEM_EL, MEM_ZIP]

goal: !l1 l2. ALL_DISTINCT (ZIP (l1,l2)) /\ (LENGTH l1 = LENGTH l2) ==> ALL_DISTINCT (ZIP (l2,l1))
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [] [EL_ALL_DISTINCT_EL_EQ] THEN Q.PAT_X_ASSUM ‘X = Y’ (ASSUME_TAC o SYM) THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [EL_ZIP, LENGTH_ZIP] THEN METIS_TAC []

goal: !l n. (ALL_DISTINCT l /\ n < LENGTH l) ==> INDEX_OF (EL n l) l = SOME n
tactic_proof: Induct \\ rw[INDEX_OF_def] \\ rw[INDEX_FIND_def] >- ( Cases_on`n` \\ fs[] \\ metis_tac[MEM_EL] ) \\ rw[Once INDEX_FIND_add, PULL_EXISTS] \\ fs[INDEX_OF_def] \\ Cases_on`n` \\ fs[] \\ first_x_assum drule \\ rw[] \\ rw[UNCURRY, arithmeticTheory.ADD1]

goal: (_ IN _) = _ ... See IN_UNION for a concrete example. *) local fun add_applied (TheoryDelta.NewBinding (n, (th, {loc, ...}))) = ( if not (String.isPrefix "IN_" n) then () (* {APP,ABS}_applied would be just ⊢ T, so not particularly useful. *) else if List.exists (fn x => x = n) ["IN_APP", "IN_ABS"] then () else let val stem = String.extract(n,3,NONE) in if isSome (CharVector.find (equal #"_") stem) then () else case Lib.total (#1 o strip_comb o lhs o #2 o strip_forall o concl) th of NONE => () | SOME t => if not (same_const t IN_tm) then () else let val applied_thm = SIMP_RULE bool_ss [SimpLHS, IN_DEF] th val applied_name = stem ^ "_applied[simp]" val loc' = DB_dtype.inexactify_locn loc in boolLib.save_thm_at loc' (applied_name, applied_thm); () end end) | add_applied _ = () in val _ = Theory.register_hook ("pred_set.add_applied", add_applied) end Type set = “:'a -> bool”; local open OpenTheoryMap val ns = ["Set"] in fun ot0 x y = OpenTheory_const_name{const={Thy="pred_set",Name=x},name=(ns,y)} fun ot x = ot0 x x end (* =====================================================================*) (* Membership. *) (* =====================================================================*) (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------*) (* The axiom of specification: x IN {y | P y} iff P x *) (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------*) Theorem SPECIFICATION: !P x. $IN (x:'a) (P:'a set) = P x

goal: !f g m n. (!n. f n SUBSET f (SUC n)) /\ (!n. g n = f (SUC n) DIFF f n) /\ ~(m = n) ==> DISJOINT (g m) (g n)
tactic_proof: RW_TAC std_ss [] >> Know `SUC m <= n \/ SUC n <= m` >- DECIDE_TAC >> REWRITE_TAC [LESS_EQ_EXISTS] >> STRIP_TAC >| [Know `f (SUC m) SUBSET f n` >- PROVE_TAC [SUBSET_ADD] >> RW_TAC std_ss [DISJOINT_DEF, EXTENSION, IN_INTER, NOT_IN_EMPTY, IN_DIFF, SUBSET_DEF] >> PROVE_TAC [], Know `f (SUC n) SUBSET f m` >- PROVE_TAC [SUBSET_ADD] >> RW_TAC std_ss [DISJOINT_DEF, EXTENSION, IN_INTER, NOT_IN_EMPTY, IN_DIFF, SUBSET_DEF] >> PROVE_TAC []]

goal: !x:'a. !s. x IN (x INSERT s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT]

goal: !s:'a set. (s = EMPTY) \/ ?x:'a. ?t. ((s = x INSERT t) /\ ~(x IN t))
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,NOT_IN_EMPTY] THEN GEN_TAC THEN DISJ_CASES_THEN MP_TAC (SPEC (“?x:'a. x IN s”) EXCLUDED_MIDDLE) THENL [STRIP_TAC THEN DISJ2_TAC THEN MAP_EVERY EXISTS_TAC [“x:'a”, “{y:'a | y IN s /\ ~(y = x)}”] THEN REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV SET_SPEC_CONV) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[EXCLUDED_MIDDLE], CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV NOT_EXISTS_CONV) THEN STRIP_TAC THEN DISJ1_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC]

goal: !s:'a set. !x. x IN s <=> ?t. s = x INSERT t /\ x NOTIN t
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [DISCH_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“{y:'a | y IN s /\ ~(y = x)}”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV SET_SPEC_CONV) THEN REWRITE_TAC [] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXCLUDED_MIDDLE], STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT]]

goal: !x:'a. !s. (x IN s) <=> (x INSERT s = s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] THEN FIRST_ASSUM (fn th => fn g => PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [SYM(SPEC_ALL th)] g) THEN DISJ1_TAC THEN REFL_TAC

goal: !x:'a s. x IN s ==> (x INSERT s = s)
tactic_proof: METIS_TAC [ABSORPTION]

goal: !x:'a. !s. x INSERT (x INSERT s) = x INSERT s
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT,EXTENSION] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !x:'a. !y s. x INSERT (y INSERT s) = y INSERT (x INSERT s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT,EXTENSION] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !x:'a. x INSERT UNIV = UNIV
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT,IN_UNIV]

goal: !x:'a. !s. ~(EMPTY = x INSERT s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT,NOT_IN_EMPTY,IN_UNION] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV NOT_FORALL_CONV) THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !(x:'a) s t. (x INSERT s) UNION t = (if x IN t then s UNION t else x INSERT (s UNION t))
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN COND_CASES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_UNION,IN_INSERT] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !x:'a. !s t. (x INSERT s) UNION t = x INSERT (s UNION t)
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_UNION,IN_INSERT,DISJ_ASSOC]

goal: !x:'a. !s t. (x INSERT s) INTER t = (if x IN t then x INSERT (s INTER t) else s INTER t)
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN COND_CASES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INTER,IN_INSERT] THEN GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [CONJ_SYM] THEN DISCH_THEN (CONJUNCTS_THEN MP_TAC) THEN STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []]

goal: !x:'a. !s t. (x INSERT s) SUBSET t <=> x IN t /\ s SUBSET t
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT,SUBSET_DEF] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [FIRST_ASSUM MATCH_MP_TAC THEN DISJ1_TAC THEN REFL_TAC, FIRST_ASSUM MATCH_MP_TAC THEN DISJ2_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC, ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], RES_TAC]

goal: !x:'a. !s. x NOTIN s ==> !t. s SUBSET (x INSERT t) <=> s SUBSET t
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,IN_INSERT] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN let fun tac th g = SUBST_ALL_TAC th g handle _ => STRIP_ASSUME_TAC th g in RES_THEN (STRIP_THM_THEN tac) THEN RES_TAC end, REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN DISJ2_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM MATCH_MP_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC]

goal: !s t. !x:'a. (x INSERT s) DIFF t = (if x IN t then s DIFF t else (x INSERT (s DIFF t)))
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN COND_CASES_TAC THENL [ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DIFF,IN_INSERT] THEN GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[] THEN FIRST_ASSUM (fn th => fn g => SUBST_ALL_TAC th g) THEN RES_TAC, STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]], ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DIFF,IN_INSERT] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] THEN FIRST_ASSUM (fn th => fn g => SUBST_ALL_TAC th g) THEN RES_TAC]

goal: x SUBSET {a} <=> x = {} \/ x = {a}
tactic_proof: simp[EQ_IMP_THM, DISJ_IMP_THM, SUBSET_DEF] >> strip_tac >> Cases_on ‘x = {}’ >> simp[] >> rw[EQ_IMP_THM, EXTENSION] >> METIS_TAC[MEMBER_NOT_EMPTY]

goal: !P a s. (!x. x IN (a INSERT s) ==> P x) <=> P a /\ (!x. x IN s ==> P x)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT] THEN PROVE_TAC []

goal: !P a s. (?x. x IN (a INSERT s) /\ P x) <=> P a \/ ?x. x IN s /\ P x
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT] THEN PROVE_TAC []

goal: !x:'a. !s. x NOTIN s <=> (s DELETE x = s)
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DELETE] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC, FIRST_ASSUM (fn th => fn g => SUBST_ALL_TAC th g handle _ => NO_TAC g) THEN RES_TAC, RES_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM MATCH_MP_TAC THEN REFL_TAC]

goal: !s x. !x':'a. (x IN s <=> x' IN s) <=> (x IN (s DELETE x') <=> x' IN (s DELETE x))
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN ASM_CASES_TAC (“x:'a = x'”) THENL [ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], FIRST_ASSUM (ASSUME_TAC o NOT_EQ_SYM) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [IN_DELETE]]

goal: !x s. ~(x IN (s DELETE x))
tactic_proof: RW_TAC std_ss [IN_DELETE]

goal: !x:'a. !s. (s DELETE x) DELETE x = s DELETE x
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DELETE,SYM(SPEC_ALL CONJ_ASSOC)]

goal: !x:'a. !y. !s. (s DELETE x) DELETE y = (s DELETE y) DELETE x
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DELETE,CONJ_ASSOC] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THEN REPEAT CONJ_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC

goal: !x:'a. !s. (s DELETE x) SUBSET s
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,IN_DELETE] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC

goal: !x:'a. !s t. s SUBSET (t DELETE x) <=> x NOTIN s /\ s SUBSET t
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,IN_DELETE,EXTENSION] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [REPEAT STRIP_TAC THENL [ASSUME_TAC (REFL (“x:'a”)) THEN RES_TAC, RES_TAC], REPEAT STRIP_TAC THENL [RES_TAC, FIRST_ASSUM (fn th => fn g => SUBST_ALL_TAC th g) THEN RES_TAC]]

goal: !x:'a. !s t. s SUBSET (x INSERT t) <=> ((s DELETE x) SUBSET t)
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,IN_INSERT,IN_DELETE] THEN EQ_TAC THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THENL [RES_TAC THEN RES_TAC, ASM_CASES_TAC (“x':'a = x”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[] THEN RES_TAC]

goal: !s t. !x:'a. s DIFF (x INSERT t) = (s DELETE x) DIFF t
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DIFF,IN_INSERT,IN_DELETE] THEN REWRITE_TAC [DE_MORGAN_THM,CONJ_ASSOC]

goal: !s t. s PSUBSET t <=> ?x:'a. x NOTIN s /\ (x INSERT s) SUBSET t
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [PSUBSET_DEF,NOT_EQUAL_SETS] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [ASM_CASES_TAC (“(x:'a) IN s”) THENL [ASM_CASES_TAC (“(x:'a) IN t”) THENL [RES_TAC, IMP_RES_TAC SUBSET_DEF THEN RES_TAC], EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN RES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [INSERT_SUBSET]], IMP_RES_TAC INSERT_SUBSET, IMP_RES_TAC INSERT_SUBSET THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]]

goal: !s:'a set. !t. s PSUBSET t <=> s SUBSET t /\ ?y. y IN t /\ y NOTIN s
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [PSUBSET_DEF] THEN PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,SUBSET_DEF] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV NOT_FORALL_CONV) THEN PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [lemma] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [RES_TAC, EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] THEN ASM_CASES_TAC (“(x:'a) IN s”) THENL [RES_TAC THEN RES_TAC,FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC], RES_TAC, EXISTS_TAC (“y:'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]]

goal: !(x:'a) y s. (x INSERT s) DELETE y = (if (x=y) then s DELETE y else x INSERT (s DELETE y))
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DELETE,IN_INSERT] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [DISCH_THEN (STRIP_THM_THEN MP_TAC) THEN DISCH_TAC THEN let fun tac th g = SUBST_ALL_TAC th g handle _ => ASSUME_TAC th g in DISCH_THEN (STRIP_THM_THEN tac) THENL [ASM_REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT], COND_CASES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [IN_DELETE,IN_INSERT]] end, COND_CASES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [IN_DELETE,IN_INSERT] THENL [STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], STRIP_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []]]

goal: !x:'a. !s. x IN s ==> (x INSERT (s DELETE x) = s)
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT,IN_DELETE] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN DISCH_THEN (fn th => GEN_TAC THEN MP_TAC th) THEN ASM_CASES_TAC (“x':'a = x”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !s t. !x:'a. (s DELETE x) INTER t = (s INTER t) DELETE x
tactic_proof: PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [IN_INTER,IN_DELETE] THEN EQ_TAC THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN FIRST [FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC,RES_TAC]

goal: !s t. !x:'a. DISJOINT (s DELETE x) t = DISJOINT (t DELETE x) s
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [DISJOINT_DEF,EXTENSION,NOT_IN_EMPTY] THEN REWRITE_TAC [IN_INTER,IN_DELETE,DE_MORGAN_THM] THEN REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THEN let val X = (“X:'a”) in DISCH_THEN (fn th => X_GEN_TAC X THEN STRIP_ASSUME_TAC (SPEC X th)) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] end

goal: (?x. x IN s) /\ (!x. x IN s ==> P x) ==> P (CHOICE s)
tactic_proof: rpt strip_tac >> first_x_assum irule >> METIS_TAC[CHOICE_DEF, MEMBER_NOT_EMPTY]

goal: !x:'a. !s. x IN (REST s) <=> x IN s /\ ~(x = CHOICE s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [REST_DEF, IN_DELETE]

goal: !s:'a set. ~(CHOICE s IN REST s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_DELETE,REST_DEF]

goal: !s:'a set. ~(s = EMPTY) ==> ((CHOICE s) INSERT (REST s) = s)
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT,REST_DEF,IN_DELETE] THEN GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THENL [IMP_RES_TAC CHOICE_DEF THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXCLUDED_MIDDLE]]

goal: !s:'a set. (REST s) SUBSET s
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,REST_DEF,IN_DELETE] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC

goal: !s:'a set. ~(s = EMPTY) ==> (REST s) PSUBSET s
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [PSUBSET_DEF,REST_SUBSET] THEN GEN_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,REST_DEF,IN_DELETE] THEN CONV_TAC NOT_FORALL_CONV THEN REWRITE_TAC [DE_MORGAN_THM,lemma,NOT_IMP] THEN EXISTS_TAC (“CHOICE (s:'a set)”) THEN IMP_RES_TAC CHOICE_DEF THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: SING (s UNION t) <=> SING s /\ (t = {}) \/ SING t /\ (s = {}) \/ SING s /\ SING t /\ (s = t)
tactic_proof: SRW_TAC [][SING_DEF, EXTENSION, EQ_IMP_THM, FORALL_AND_THM, DISJ_IMP_THM] THEN METIS_TAC []

goal: !x y. x IN {y:'a} <=> (x = y)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_INSERT,NOT_IN_EMPTY]

goal: !x:'a. ~({x} = EMPTY)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_SING,NOT_IN_EMPTY] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV NOT_FORALL_CONV) THEN GEN_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !x:'a. ~(EMPTY = {x})
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_SING,NOT_IN_EMPTY] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV NOT_FORALL_CONV) THEN GEN_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN REWRITE_TAC[]

goal: !x:'a. DISJOINT {x} EMPTY
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [DISJOINT_DEF,INTER_EMPTY]

goal: !s. !x:'a. x INSERT s = {x} UNION s
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_INSERT,IN_UNION,NOT_IN_EMPTY]

goal: !s. !x:'a. (x IN s) ==> ((s DELETE x = EMPTY) = (s = {x}))
tactic_proof: PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION] THEN REWRITE_TAC [NOT_IN_EMPTY,DE_MORGAN_THM,IN_INSERT,IN_DELETE] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [DISCH_TAC THEN GEN_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM (fn th=>fn g => STRIP_ASSUME_TAC (SPEC (“x':'a”) th) g) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] THEN DISCH_THEN SUBST_ALL_TAC THEN RES_TAC, let val th = PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_RULE [DISJ_SYM] EXCLUDED_MIDDLE in DISCH_TAC THEN GEN_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [th] end]

goal: !s:'a set. SING s <=> s <> EMPTY /\ REST s = EMPTY
tactic_proof: PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [SING_DEF] THEN GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THENL [ASM_REWRITE_TAC [REST_SING] THEN REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,NOT_IN_EMPTY,IN_INSERT] THEN CONV_TAC NOT_FORALL_CONV THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN REWRITE_TAC [], EXISTS_TAC (“CHOICE s:'a”) THEN IMP_RES_THEN (SUBST1_TAC o SYM) CHOICE_INSERT_REST THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_SING,CHOICE_SING]]
rw[EXTENSION, EQ_IMP_THM] >> metis_tac[]

goal: !s x. x IN s ==> (s INTER {x} = {x})
tactic_proof: rw[INTER_DEF, EXTENSION, EQ_IMP_THM]

goal: !s x. {x} INTER s = if x IN s then {x} else {}
tactic_proof: rw[EXTENSION] >> metis_tac[]

goal: !s. s <> {} ==> (SING s <=> !x y. x IN s /\ y IN s ==> (x = y))
tactic_proof: metis_tac[SING_DEF, IN_SING, ONE_ELEMENT_SING]

goal: !s. SING s ==> (!x y. x IN s /\ y IN s ==> (x = y))
tactic_proof: metis_tac[SING_DEF, IN_SING]

goal: !s. SING s <=> s <> {} /\ (!x y. x IN s /\ y IN s ==> (x = y))
tactic_proof: metis_tac[SING_EMPTY, SING_ELEMENT, SING_ONE_ELEMENT]

goal: !x s. (x IN s) ==> !(f:'a->'b). f x IN (IMAGE f s)
tactic_proof: PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [IN_IMAGE] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”) THEN CONJ_TAC THENL [REFL_TAC, FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC]

goal: !s:'a set. IMAGE (\x:'a.x) s = s
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_IMAGE] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV BETA_CONV) THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [ALL_TAC,EXISTS_TAC (“x:'a”)] THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !(f :'b -> 'c) (g :'a -> 'b) s. IMAGE (f o g) s = IMAGE f (IMAGE g s)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC[EXTENSION, IN_IMAGE, o_THM] THEN MESON_TAC[]

goal: IMAGE I = I
tactic_proof: RW_TAC std_ss [FUN_EQ_THM] >> METIS_TAC [SPECIFICATION, IN_IMAGE, I_THM]

goal: !f:'b->'c. !g:'a->'b. !s. IMAGE (f o g) s = IMAGE f (IMAGE g s)
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_IMAGE,o_THM] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [EXISTS_TAC (“g (x':'a):'b”) THEN CONJ_TAC THENL [ALL_TAC,EXISTS_TAC (“x':'a”)] THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [], EXISTS_TAC (“x'':'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]]

goal: !(f:'a->'b) x s. ~(x IN s) ==> (IMAGE f (s DELETE x) = (IMAGE f s))
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THEN PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_DELETE,IN_IMAGE] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x'':'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC [] THEN DISCH_THEN SUBST_ALL_TAC THEN RES_TAC

goal: !(f:'a->'b) s t. IMAGE f (s UNION t) = (IMAGE f s) UNION (IMAGE f t)
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION,IN_UNION,IN_IMAGE] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [DISJ1_TAC,DISJ2_TAC,ALL_TAC,ALL_TAC] THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x':'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !s t. (s SUBSET t) ==> !f:'a->'b. (IMAGE f s) SUBSET (IMAGE f t)
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,IN_IMAGE] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN RES_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x':'a”) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC []

goal: !(f:'a->'b) s t. IMAGE f (s INTER t) SUBSET (IMAGE f s INTER IMAGE f t)
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC [SUBSET_DEF,IN_IMAGE,IN_INTER] THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC (“x':'a”) THEN CONJ_TAC THEN FIRST_ASSUM ACCEPT_TAC

goal: (!x y. (f x = f y) <=> (x = y)) ==> ((IMAGE f s1 = IMAGE f s2) <=> (s1 = s2))
tactic_proof: STRIP_TAC THEN SIMP_TAC (srw_ss()) [EQ_IMP_THM] THEN SRW_TAC [boolSimps.DNF_ss][EXTENSION, EQ_IMP_THM]

goal: (!x y. (f x = f y) <=> (x = y)) ==> (DISJOINT (IMAGE f s1) (IMAGE f s2) <=> DISJOINT s1 s2)
tactic_proof: simp[DISJOINT_DEF, EQ_IMP_THM, EXTENSION] >> METIS_TAC[]

goal: GSPEC f = IMAGE (FST o f) (SND o f)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [EXTENSION, IN_IMAGE, GSPECIFICATION] THEN GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THEN STRIP_TAC THEN Q.EXISTS_TAC `x'` THEN Cases_on `f x'` THEN FULL_SIMP_TAC bool_ss [EXTENSION, SPECIFICATION, o_THM, FST, SND, PAIR_EQ]

goal: !f g s. IMAGE f (IMAGE g s) = IMAGE (f o g) s
tactic_proof: RW_TAC std_ss [EXTENSION, IN_IMAGE, o_THM] >> PROVE_TAC []

goal: !P f s. (!y. y IN IMAGE f s ==> P y) <=> (!x. x IN s ==> P(f x))
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_IMAGE] THEN PROVE_TAC []

goal: !P f s. (?y. y IN IMAGE f s /\ P y) <=> ?x. x IN s /\ P(f x)
tactic_proof: REWRITE_TAC [IN_IMAGE] THEN PROVE_TAC []

goal: (* from topologyTheory *) !f:'a->'b s t. s SUBSET (IMAGE f t) <=> ?u. u SUBSET t /\ (s = IMAGE f u)
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN EQ_TAC THENL [ALL_TAC, MESON_TAC[IMAGE_SUBSET]] THEN DISCH_TAC THEN EXISTS_TAC ``{x | x IN t /\ (f:'a->'b) x IN s}`` THEN POP_ASSUM MP_TAC THEN SIMP_TAC std_ss [EXTENSION, SUBSET_DEF, IN_IMAGE, GSPECIFICATION] THEN MESON_TAC[]

goal: (* from HOL-Light *) !(s:'a->bool) (c:'b). IMAGE (\x. c) s = if s = {} then {} else {c}
tactic_proof: REPEAT GEN_TAC THEN COND_CASES_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[IMAGE_CLAUSES] THEN REWRITE_TAC[EXTENSION, IN_IMAGE, IN_SING] THEN ASM_MESON_TAC[MEMBER_NOT_EMPTY]

goal: INJ (f:'a -> 'b) s t <=> (!x. x IN s ==> f x IN t) /\ (!x y. x IN s /\ y IN s ==> ((f x = f y) <=> (x = y)))
tactic_proof: METIS_TAC[INJ_DEF]

goal: !s. INJ (\x:'a.x) s s
tactic_proof: PURE_ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [INJ_DEF] THEN CONV_TAC (ONCE_DEPTH_CONV BETA_CONV) THEN REPEAT STRIP_TAC

goal: !f:'a->'b. !g:'b->'c. !s t u. (INJ f s t /\ INJ g t u) ==> INJ (g o f) s u
tactic_proof: PURE_REWRITE_TAC [INJ_DEF,o_THM] THEN REPEAT (STRIP_TAC ORELSE EQ_TAC) THENL [FIRST_ASSUM MATCH_MP_TAC THEN RES_TAC, RES_TAC THEN RES_TAC]

goal: !f s t. INJ f s t ==> !e. e IN s ==> INJ f (s DELETE e) (t DELETE (f e))

tactic_proof: rw[real_sub,REAL_EQ_RDIV_EQ'] >> ‘!x y. x = -b + y <=> x + b = y’ by simp[Once REAL_ADD_COMM,GSYM real_sub,REAL_EQ_SUB_LADD] >> simp[] >> pop_assum kall_tac >> simp[GSYM real_sub] >> irule SQUARE_ROOTS >> simp[ADD_POW_2,POW_MUL,REAL_EQ_SUB_LADD] >> (* I'm sure there is a better way to do this, I don't know it *) pop_assum $ mp_tac o AP_TERM “λy. 4r * a * y + b²” >> simp[REAL_ADD_LDISTRIB,REAL_POW_2] >> qmatch_abbrev_tac ‘l1:real = r ==> l2 = r’ >> ‘l1 = l2’ suffices_by simp[] >> UNABBREV_ALL_TAC
RW_TAC std_ss [GSYM REAL_MUL_ASSOC, GSYM REAL_INV_MUL, GSYM real_div] >> METIS_TAC [REAL_ADD_RAT, REAL_MUL_COMM]
METIS_TAC [REAL_LT_IMP_NE, RAT_LEMMA1]
DISCH_THEN(MP_TAC o GEN_ALL o MATCH_MP RAT_LEMMA2) THEN REWRITE_TAC[real_div] THEN DISCH_TAC THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[real_sub, GSYM REAL_MUL_LNEG]

ONCE_REWRITE_TAC[CONJ_SYM] THEN DISCH_TAC THEN ONCE_REWRITE_TAC[REAL_ARITH ``a <= b <=> &0 <= b - a``] THEN FIRST_ASSUM(fn th => REWRITE_TAC[MATCH_MP RAT_LEMMA3 th]) THEN MATCH_MP_TAC EQ_TRANS THEN Q.EXISTS_TAC `&0 <= (x2 * y1 - x1 * y2) * inv y2` THEN REWRITE_TAC[REAL_MUL_ASSOC] THEN CONJ_TAC THEN MATCH_MP_TAC lemma THEN MATCH_MP_TAC REAL_LT_INV' THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]
REPEAT DISCH_TAC THEN REWRITE_TAC[GSYM REAL_LE_ANTISYM] THEN MATCH_MP_TAC(TAUT `(a <=> a') /\ (b <=> b') ==> (a /\ b <=> a' /\ b')`) THEN CONJ_TAC THEN MATCH_MP_TAC RAT_LEMMA4 THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[]

rw[] >> ‘y1*y2 <> 0’ by simp[] >> simp[real_div] >> ‘x1 * inv y1 = x2 * inv y2 <=> x1 * inv y1 * (y1 * y2) = x2 * inv y2 * (y1 * y2)’ by simp[REAL_EQ_RMUL] >> ‘x1 * inv y1 * (y1 * y2) = x2 * inv y2 * (y1 * y2) <=> x1 * y2 * (inv y1 * y1) = x2 * y1 * (inv y2 * y2)’ by metis_tac[REAL_MUL_ASSOC, REAL_MUL_SYM] >> ‘x1 * y2 * (inv y1 * y1) = x2 * y1 * (inv y2 * y2) <=> x1 * y2 = x2 * y1’ by simp[REAL_MUL_LINV] >> metis_tac[]

goal: 0:real < 1/2
tactic_proof: PROVE_TAC [REAL_LT_01, REAL_LT_HALF1]

goal: 1 / 2 < 1:real
tactic_proof: ONCE_REWRITE_TAC [GSYM REAL_INV_1OVER, GSYM REAL_INV1] >> MATCH_MP_TAC REAL_LT_INV >> RW_TAC arith_ss [REAL_LT]
Suff `2 * inv 2 = 1:real` >- PROVE_TAC [REAL_INV_1OVER] >> PROVE_TAC [REAL_MUL_RINV, REAL_ARITH ``~(2:real = 0)``]
STRIP_TAC >> MATCH_MP_TAC (REAL_ARITH ``(2 * (a:real) = 2 * b) ==> (a = b)``) >> RW_TAC std_ss [REAL_ADD_LDISTRIB, REAL_MUL_ASSOC, HALF_CANCEL] >> REAL_ARITH_TAC
MP_TAC (Q.SPEC `1` X_HALF_HALF) >> RW_TAC std_ss [REAL_MUL_RID] >> MATCH_MP_TAC (REAL_ARITH ``((x:real) + 1 / 2 = y + 1 / 2) ==> (x = y)``) >> RW_TAC std_ss [REAL_SUB_ADD]

goal: !n. 0:real < (1/2) pow n
tactic_proof: STRIP_TAC >> Cases_on `n` >- PROVE_TAC [REAL_LT_01, pow] >> PROVE_TAC [HALF_POS, POW_POS_LT]
ONCE_REWRITE_TAC[GSYM REAL_SUB_0] THEN REWRITE_TAC[GSYM REAL_ENTIRE] THEN REAL_ARITH_TAC
REWRITE_TAC[EQ_IMP_THM] >> rpt strip_tac >> FULL_SIMP_TAC std_ss [EQ_IMP_THM, REAL_SUB_REFL, REAL_MUL_LZERO, REAL_10] >> irule_at Any REAL_MUL_RINV >> ASM_REWRITE_TAC [REAL_SUB_0]

REPEAT STRIP_TAC THEN STRIP_ASSUME_TAC(SPEC ``x:real`` REAL_LT_NEGTOTAL) THEN STRIP_ASSUME_TAC(SPEC ``y:real`` REAL_LT_NEGTOTAL) THEN ASM_REWRITE_TAC[REAL_MUL_LZERO, REAL_MUL_RZERO, REAL_LT_REFL] THEN ASSUM_LIST(MP_TAC o MATCH_MP REAL_LT_MUL o end_itlist CONJ) THEN REPEAT(POP_ASSUM MP_TAC) THEN REAL_ARITH_TAC
